instruction: Looking at my bills. Wow,  2 of 0.6 mm hardened nozzle at price of 19 is crazy. How much did pay this company in total? Number only
notes: User describes a line item 'qty 2 of 0.6 mm hardened nozzle at unit price 19'. Two bills contain a 'hardened nozzle' line item: (a) studio_parts_nozzle_and_inserts (2026-02-04, Düsenschmiede München, qty=1 unit=19 line=19, total=33) and (b) black_library_terrain_spool (2026-03-03, Filamenthütte Wien, qty=2 unit=19 line=38, total=89). Only bill (b) matches BOTH qty AND unit_eur. 'this company' = Filamenthütte Wien. Their bills sum: 72+80+89=241. Agent in bench7 picked Düsenschmiede via filename keyword 'nozzle' even though qty=1 mismatched the user's qty=2 — violation of multi-value descriptor matching rule.
